zh.Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alfred Sulney於1310年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼時，他的父親William Sulney40歲，母親Sibilia De Bagot18歲。他於1325年與Margaret De Trussell在英國英格蘭德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1377年在英國德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼。

nameMeanings.name: Sulney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sunley Hill in Kirkdale (North Yorkshire). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Sunnólfr + Old Norse haugr ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Alfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ræd ‘counsel’. It was a relatively common name before the Norman Conquest of Britain, being borne most notably by Alfred the Great ( 849–899 ), King of Wessex. After the Conquest it was adopted by the Normans in a variety of more or less radically altered forms ( see Avery ). In some regions the forms Alvery and Avery never fell entirely out of favour and became locally popular in the 16th century. It provides a rare example ( Edward is another) of a distinctively Old English name that has spread widely on the Continent. It was strongly revived in the 19th century, along with other names of pre-Conquest historical figures, faded in the mid-20th century, but has since recovered some popularity.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alfred Sulney was born in 1310, in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Sulney, was 40 and his mother, Sibilia De Bagot, was 18. He married Margaret De Trussell in 1325, in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1377, in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alfred Sulney est né en 1310, à Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sulney, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sibilia De Bagot, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Trussell en 1325, à Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1377, à Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alfred Sulney è nato il nel 1310 nel Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Sulney, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sibilia De Bagot, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Trussell nel 1325, nel Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alfred Sulneyが1310年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニュートン ソルニーで生まれた時，父William Sulneyは40歳，母Sibilia De Bagotは18歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニュートン ソルニーでMargaret De Trussellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1377年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアニュートン ソルニーで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアニュートン ソルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alfred Sulney(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴턴 솔니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sulney(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilia De Bagot(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴턴 솔니에서 Margaret De Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국 더비실르 뉴턴 솔니에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 뉴턴 솔니에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret De Trussell em 1325, em Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alfred Sulney родился в 1310 г. в местности нютон солни, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Sulney было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibilia De Bagot, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Trussell в 1325 г. в местности нютон солни, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности нютон солни, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности нютон солни, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
